items.title: French teenager Seixas becomes youngest Fleche Wallonne winner
items.summary: French prodigy Paul Seixas at 19 became the youngest winner of the La Fleche Wallonne one-day classic on Wednesday in his first ride in the race. Seixas beat home Switzerland's Mauro Schmid and British rider Ben Tulett to replace Philemon De Meersman in the race's history books as the Belgian was 21 years old and 150 days when he won in 1936.

items.title: New round of talks in Washington: Lebanon, Israel to discuss truce extension
items.summary: Lebanese ​and Israeli envoys will meet for the second time in two weeks in Washington on Thursday, building on nascent contacts between the states, with Lebanon hoping for the extension of a shaky ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel. The 10-day, US-mediated ceasefire is set to expire on Sunday. For more, Stuart Norval is joined by FRANCE 24's International Affairs Editor Philip Turle and Noga Tarnopolsky reporting from Jerusalem.

items.title: Iran tightens control of Hormuz after US calls off renewed attacks
items.summary: Iran seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz as it tightened its grip on ​the strategic waterway after US President Donald Trump announced he was indefinitely calling off attacks, with no sign of peace talks restarting. The status of a two-week-old ceasefire, due to have expired earlier this week, remained unclear.

items.title: 'You are not alone': Pope hits out at jails in closed-off Equatorial Guinea
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV on Wednesday made a tightly controlled visit to a notorious prison in Equatorial Guinea's biggest city, after launching a rare criticism of living conditions for inmates. Prisoners lined up in the freshly repainted courtyard of Bata prison, breaking into song and dance in the driving rain as they greeted the leader of the world's 1.4 billion Catholics.

items.title: Chihuahua operation: Mexico, US trade harsh words over deaths of two US agents
items.summary: Mexico's government and the White House sparred Wednesday over the death of two Americans in connection to an anti-drug raid, after US media reported the officials were CIA personnel. The two Americans died in a car accident on Sunday in the northern state of Chihuahua. Two Mexican investigators also died in the crash.

items.title: In Gaza, first local vote in years offers gauge of Hamas popularity
items.summary: Palestinians in one of the only Gaza cities ​not overrun by Israeli ground forces during the war will vote this weekend in municipal elections that will feature some pro-Hamas candidates, offering a rare barometer of the militant group's popularity. The vote in Deir al-Balah is part of Palestinian Authority municipal elections that Palestinians have cast as a display of national unity against a US plan for Gaza that they believe intends to entrench their ​separation from the occupied ‌West Bank.

items.title: Train collision in Denmark prompts massive emergency response near Copenhagen
items.summary: At least 17 people were injured after two trains collided Thursday morning near Denmark's capital of Copenhagen, according to police and media reports. The accident prompted a massive emergency response, and several injured passengers were flown to a hospital, local authorities said.

items.title: Les jeux d'argent en Indonésie, un fléau pour les jeunes, complètement accros
items.summary: Sur l’archipel indonésien, on estime à près d’un million le nombre de mineurs qui jouent de l’argent sur internet. Pis, les autorités ont identifié plus de 80 000 joueurs âgés de moins de 10 ans... Pour eux, jouer n'est pas un simple loisir, mais un ticket de loterie désespéré. Cette pratique est pourtant illégale dans ce pays à majorité musulmane. En 2024, le pays a enregistré des dizaines de suicides liés à ces jeux sur internet. Reportage d'Antoine Morel et Leo Galuh.

translation.title: Gambling in Indonesia, a scourge for young people, completely addicted
translation.summary: On the Indonesian archipelago, the number of minors playing money on the Internet is estimated at nearly one million. Worse, the authorities have identified more than 80,000 players under the age of 10... For them, playing is not a mere leisure, but a desperate lottery ticket. However, this practice is illegal in this Muslim-majority country. In 2024, the country recorded dozens of suicides linked to these games on the Internet. Report by Antoine Morel and Leo Galuh.

items.title: G7 Environnement : le climat absent des discussions
items.summary: A la Une de la presse ce jeudi 23 avril, pas de discussions sur le climat lors du G7, organisé ce jeudi et vendredi à Paris, pour garder les Américains à bord. Une enquête des médias allemands sur la façon dont les autorités traquent les djihadistes dans leur pays, notamment grâce à des documents transmis par le FBI. Et pour terminer, les récentes prouesses de l'intelligence artificielle.

translation.title: G7 Environment: climate absent from discussions
translation.summary: Press coverage this Thursday 23rd April, no climate talks during the G7, organised this Thursday and Friday in Paris, to keep the Americans on board. An investigation by the German media into how the authorities are tracking the jihadists in their country, including through FBI documents. And finally, the recent prowess of artificial intelligence.

items.title: Le secrétaire ​américain à la Marine limogé en plein conflit avec l'Iran
items.summary: Le plus haut responsable civil de la Marine américaine, John Phelan, quitte ses fonctions "avec effet immédiat", a indiqué mercredi le Pentagone, sans fournir d'explication à son départ soudain. Des sources indiquent cependant que le secrétaire à la Marine a été limogé, comme de nombreux autres responsables avant lui depuis le retour de Donald Trump à la Maison Blanche.

translation.title: U.S. Secretary of the Navy dismissed in conflict with Iran
translation.summary: The U.S. Navy's chief civilian officer, John Phelan, left his duties "with immediate effect," the Pentagon said on Wednesday, without providing any explanation for his sudden departure. Sources indicate, however, that the Secretary of the Navy has been dismissed, like many other officials before him since Donald Trump's return to the White House.

items.title: Coupe de France : Nice file en finale après sa victoire à Strasbourg
items.summary: L’OGC Nice s’est imposé sur la pelouse de Strasbourg (2-0) en demi-finale de la Coupe de France et rejoint Lens en finale. Les Niçois ont fait la différence grâce à un doublé d'Elye Wahi. D’abord dominés par un Racing classé 8ᵉ de Ligue 1, les Azuréens, 15ᵉ, ont su rester solides défensivement et efficaces offensivement. Nice retrouvera le Stade de France le 22 mai, quatre ans après sa dernière finale perdue contre Nantes (1-0).

translation.title: Coupe de France: Nice in the final after his victory in Strasbourg
translation.summary: LioGC Nice won on the Strasbourg lawn (2-0) in the semifinal of the Coupe de France and joined Lens in the final. The Niçois made the difference thanks to a double of Elye Wahi. First dominated by a Racing ranked 8th in Ligue 1, the French, 15th, managed to remain strong defensively and effective offensively. Nice will return to the Stade de France on 22 May, four years after his last lost final against Nantes (1-0).

items.title: Football américain : Jeffrey M'Ba, le Franco-Gabonais qui pourrait s'ouvrir les portes de la NFL
items.summary: À 26 ans, Jeffrey M'Ba pourrait devenir le deuxième Français à être "drafté" par un club en NFL, le championnat de football américain. Né à Libreville, au Gabon, ce défenseur a découvert tardivement ce sport en France, avant de se former aux États-Unis. "Je veux juste qu'on appelle mon nom. Peu importe qui m'appelle, je répondrai présent", explique ce joueur au physique imposant.

translation.title: American Football: Jeffrey M'Ba, the Franco-Gabonais who could open the doors of the NFL
translation.summary: At 26, Jeffrey M'Ba could become the second Frenchman to be "drafted" by a club in NFL, the American football championship. Born in Libreville, Gabon, this defender later discovered this sport in France, before training in the United States. "I just want to be called my name. No matter who calls me, I will answer present," explains this player with an imposing physics.

Suivez notre direct.

items.title: Prêt à l'Ukraine débloqué, Volodymyr Zelensky attendu à Chypre pour un sommet européen
items.summary: Le président ukrainien Volodymyr Zelensky est attendu ce jeudi à Chypre pour un sommet européen, alors que le déblocage d'un prêt européen de 90 milliards d'euros à Kiev doit être validé dans la journée. Les chefs d'État et de gouvernement européens doivent aussi aborder la guerre au Moyen-Orient.

translation.title: Ready for unlocked Ukraine, Volodymyr Zelensky expected in Cyprus for a European summit
translation.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is expected this Thursday in Cyprus for a European summit, while the release of a EUR 90 billion European loan in Kiev must be validated during the day. European Heads of State and Government must also address the Middle East war.

items.title: Traversées irrégulières de la Manche : la France et le Royaume-Uni concluent un nouvel accord
items.summary: La France et le Royaume-Uni ont trouvé un terrain d'entente pour reconduire pour trois ans le traité de Sandhurst afin de lutter contre les traversées clandestines de la Manche. Une partie du financement britannique comprend une part "flexible", conditionnée à l'efficacité des mesures prises. L'accord prévoit aussi d'augmenter de moitié les forces de l'ordre dédiées à cette mission.

translation.title: Irregular Channel Crossings: France and the United Kingdom conclude new agreement
translation.summary: France and the United Kingdom have found common ground to renew the Sandhurst Treaty for three years in order to combat the clandestine crossings of the Channel. Part of British financing includes a "flexible" part, conditional on the effectiveness of the measures taken. The agreement also provides for a halving of the police forces dedicated to this mission.

items.title: Mythes et réalités de l'arsenal militaire iranien

Objectif : montrer que les capacités militaires du pays sont encore solides. Pourtant, il n'y a pas si longtemps, Donald Trump expliquait au monde que la République islamique n'était plus une menace.

translation.title: Myths and realities of Iran's military arsenal
translation.summary: On Tuesday, Iranian propaganda once again broadcast images of a crowd in a row on one of Tehran's main squares around an imposing missile. Objective: to demonstrate that the country's military capabilities are still strong. Yet, not so long ago, Donald Trump explained to the world that the Islamic Republic was no longer a threat.

items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. Article 1 of the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters (approved by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and issued by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and revised by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 26 May 2025) lays down the present rules for the discussion and decision of party membership matters, in accordance with the Regulations on the Work of the Chinese Communist Party Group and the Regulations on the Approval of Competences and Procedures for the Punishment of Disciplinary Violations by the Chinese Communist Party. (b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
